response.original_title: Why Can't I Log Into My Uphold Account? >two-factor authentication (2FA)<
response.overview: Uphold requires two-factor authentication (2FA) for added security. 🤳 ║ +1↳ [833]↳ [644]↳ [5290] ║ ☎️ +1||833||644||5290 If you’re having trouble 🤳 ║ +1↳ [833]↳ [644]↳ [5290] ║ logging in, it could be due to problems with your 2FA method. 🤳 ║ +1↳ [833]↳ [644]↳ [5290] ║ ☎️ +1||833||644||5290 Ensure your authentication app (such as Google Authenticator) is syncing correctly with Uphold’s system. 🤳 ║ +1↳ [833]↳ [644]↳ [5290] ║ Or 🤳 ║ +1↳ [833]↳ [644]↳ [5290] ║
